_comment: Multiplayer audio sandbox bus config. Adapted from examples/coop_shooter_template/gool/config.json. Three-bus layout with sidechain ducking: gunshots route to LocalSfx (own player) or RemoteSfx (other players), and the Music bus has a sidechain compressor keyed off LocalSfx so the music dips during your own gunfire. Loaded by gool's runtime_singleton at startup via Project Settings → addons/gool/config_path (defaults to res://gool/config.json).
